creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
KIMURA Yasuhiro wrote:
> 	Update to latest version 1.8.7-p17.

This breaks rails 2.0, and probably 1.2.6 /usr/ports/www/rubygem-rails

Also, thats a large list of PORTREVISION bumps you'll need to chase this.

I use rails for $work and can look at updating these particular ports.

I.E (with so repo copies)s
www/rubygem-rails1
www/rubygem-rails-devel
www/rubygem-rails20
